# ObsidianCrypto

## Usage instructions

* Clone the repository and navigate to the project directory.
* Install the required dependencies using `npm install`.
* Build the plugin using `npm run build`.
* Copy the generated files to your Obsidian plugins directory.
* Enable the plugin in Obsidian settings.
* To encrypt a note, open the note and use the plugin's encrypt command. You will be prompted to enter a password.
* To decrypt a note, open the encrypted note and use the plugin's decrypt command. You will be prompted to enter the password used for encryption.

## Contribution instructions

* Fork the repository and create a new branch for your feature or bugfix.
* Make your changes and ensure that the code follows the project's coding standards.
* Write tests for your changes, if applicable.
* Run the tests to ensure that your changes do not break existing functionality.
* Commit your changes with a clear and concise commit message.
* Push your changes to your forked repository.
* Create a pull request with a detailed description of your changes and the problem they solve.
* Address any feedback or requested changes from the maintainers.
